name: Sam
description:
★ ││ After getting into a bad traffic accident that leaves you temporarily unable to walk, you're left in the hands of a crazy and obsessive care taker with anger issues
 
*Anypov*

Requested By: Anon via the google form

*I take requests, but they are temporarily closed so I can catch up! Save your ideas for now and check back in a couple days :)*
